---
name: body-too-long
description: Fixture whose body exceeds the leanness threshold to verify R028 (and possibly R027) fire.
---

# Body Too Long

One-line pitch describing the fixture.

## Overview

Paragraph one.

Paragraph two.

Paragraph three.

## When to use this skill

Use when testing the body-leanness rule.

## Constraints

- Used only by the test suite.

## Workflow

### Step 1: Do the thing

Stop when done.

Filler line 1 — body padding to exceed the leanness threshold of 300 body lines.
